title: SemanticPassport
description: Signed credential attesting to an agent's identity, version, and policy compliance state.

passport_version.description: Version of the Semantic Passport schema.

model_id.description: Unique identifier for this agent instance.

model_version.description: Semantic version or commit hash of the agent implementation.

registry_version.description: Version of the Semantic Registry anchor set this passport was issued against.

bft_consensus.description: Agent supports BFT scalar consensus participation.

entropy_flush.description: Agent supports the Entropy Flush session recovery procedure.

policy_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the active policy rule set at passport issuance time.

issued_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) at which this passport was issued.

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) after which this passport is invalid.

recovery_token.description: Non-null after a successful Entropy Flush recovery. Signals to peers that this node has recovered from a Perspective Warp incident.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex digest of the canonical passport body, signed with the Registry root key.
